Music and Computers

Draw a Waveform

The timbre of a tone is related to the shape of the repeating waveform.
To Do:
  • Draw in the box below and hear the result.
  • Hit the "Smooth" button and see and hear the result. The smoothing is done by averaging adjacent values together.
  • Draw a sine wave. Smooth it out. How low can you set the "Frequency" and still hear it well?
  • Add some spikes to the sine wave. How low can you set the "Frequency" now and still hear it?
